items.title: DHS suspends TSA PreCheck, Global Entry as partial government shutdown continues
items.description: TSA PreCheck and Global Entry services suspended starting Sunday due to government shutdown affecting Department of Homeland Security operations.

items.title: Bianco says ‘Democrat policy is indefensible’ as GOP candidates top California governor polling
items.description: Sheriff Chad Bianco responds after polling cited by the New York Post shows two Republicans leading California’s crowded governor race.

items.title: Newsom weighs in on social media age restrictions, citing experience as a parent: ‘We need help’
items.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom backs social media age limits, supporting legislation to restrict platform access for teens in bipartisan state bill.
